hooks.command: bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && pnpm check || { status=$?; echo "Sonari quality gate failed: pnpm check exited $status" >&2; exit 2; }'

bash -lc 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if git diff --name-only HEAD -- ":(glob)contracts/**/*.move" contracts/Move.toml contracts/Move.lock | grep -q .; then pnpm check:move || { status=$?; echo "Sonari contracts quality gate failed: pnpm check:move exited $status" >&2; exit 2; }; else echo "No contracts changes detected; skipping contracts quality gate"; fi'
